top_trace.command: Lift the object above the table height threshold while maintaining a stable controlled grasp.

unit_commands.command: Move the palm/base to align over the object's current xy position near (-0.0394, -0.0383), then end in a raised/retracted vertical state so the grasped object is lifted above z=0.075 while keeping the palm centered over the object.
Relative to the raised, centered palm, flex the thumb inward from open to form and maintain a firm opposing contact on the object without over-squeezing.
Relative to the raised, centered palm, flex the index inward from open to oppose the thumb and maintain a firm stabilizing pinch contact on the object during the lift.

trace.command: Move palm/base to object xy near (-0.0394, -0.0383), then retract vertically while maintaining xy centering so the grasped object is lifted above z=0.075.
Set base_x to -0.0394 to center over object x.
Set base_y to -0.0383 to center over object y.
Set base_z to -0.0750 for a raised/retracted vertical state.
Relative to the raised, centered palm, flex the thumb inward from open to form and maintain a firm opposing contact on the object without over-squeezing.
Set g_right to a large but not maximum flexion for firm opposing contact, then hold.
Relative to the raised, centered palm, flex the index inward from open to oppose the thumb and maintain a firm stabilizing pinch contact on the object during the lift.
Set g_left to large flexion/near closed and hold to maintain inward opposing contact.
